title: L'cha Dodi
html: [Intro] Cm Fm A#m G#7 Cm Cm Fm A#m A#m/G# G#7 G7 Fm A#m Lechá dodi licrat kalá D# G# G P'nêi Shabat necabelá Fm A#m Lechá dodi licrat Kalá D# Cm Fm P'nêi Shabat necabelá Fm Lechá dodi A#m D# Fm Lechá dodi licrat Kalá A#m D# Fm P'nêi Shabat necabelá A#m Fm Lechá dodi licrat Kalá A#m D# Fm P'nêi Shabat necabelá ( A#m Fm A#m A4 A7 ) Dm Gm Shamor vezachor b'dibur echad C Dm A7 Hishmianu Ei hameiuchad Dm Dm7 Gm Adonai Echad ushemo echad C A7 Dm A7 Leshem uletiferet velitehilá Dm Lechá dodi Gm C Dm Lechá dodi licrat Kalá Gm C Dm Dm7 P'nêi Shabat necabelá Gm C Dm Lechá dodi Licrat Kalá Gm A7 Dm P'nêi Shabat necabelá ( Gm Dm Gm Dm G# G#m ) Cm Cm/Bb Fm Licrat Shabat lechu venelchá Bb D#7 G#7 Gm7 ki hi mecor haberachá Cm Cm/Bb Fm merosh mikedem nesuchah Bb Gm Cm G7 sof maassê bemachashavá techilá Cm Lechá dodi Fm Bb Cm Lechá dodi licrat Kalá Fm Bb Cm P'nêi Shabat necabelá Fm Bb Cm Lechá dodi licrat Kalá Fm Gm Cm P'nêi Shabat necabelá Cm Cm/Bb Fm Yamin ushemol tifrotsi Bb D# G#7 Gm Veet Adonai taaritsi Cm Cm/Bb Fm Al-iad ish ben Partzi Bb Gm Cm Gm Venismechá venaguila Cm Lechá dodi Fm Bb Cm Lechá dodi licrat Kalá Fm Bb Cm P'nêi Shabat necabelá Fm Bb Cm Lechá dodi licrat Kalá Fm Gm Cm P'nêi Shabat necabelá Bo'i veshalom ateret baalá Gam besimchá beriná uvtsôulá Toch emunê am segulá Bo'i khalá, bo'i kalá Bo'i khalá, Shabat malketá Lechá dodi Lechá dodi licrat Kalá P'nêi Shabat necabelá Lechá dodi licrat Kalá P'nêi Shabat necabelá
